name: Tsunade (S)
description: No longer just a Sannin, Tsunade is the new Kage of Konoha, and has taken a large amount of responsibility on her shoulders. Knowing that holding back is no longer an option, Tsunade taps into her seal to gain an impressive power over her foes.
requirement: Mission: The Will of the Senju

skills.name: Heavenly Spear Kick
skills.description: Tsunade spears one enemy with her foot, destroying all their destructible defense and dealing 20 piercing damage to them. For 1 turn, that enemy's melee skills will deal 50% less damage. While empowered, this skill will deal 40 piercing damage instead.

skills.name: Enhanced Healing Wave
skills.description: Tsunade pours chakra into one ally, healing them for 30 health. Additionally, that character will heal an additional 10 health for 2 turns. If empowered, this skill will heal 40 health and the secondary effect will last an additional 1 turn.

skills.name: Tsunade: Strength of a Hundred Seal
skills.description: Tsunade taps into her seal. If Tsunade has 75 health or less, she will instantly heal 15 health. The next time Tsunade uses a skill, it will be empowered. If this skill is used while empowered, it will heal Tsunade 50 health and grant her 2 random chakra.

skills.name: Tsunade Protection
skills.description: This skill makes Tsunade (S) invulnerable for 1 turn. This skill is not affected by 'Tsunade: Strength of a Hundred Seal'.
